question.label: Week-two pulse
question.name: What's been most on your mind at work this week, Riley?
question.description: Gives Riley room to set the agenda before any onboarding friction is named.

answer: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.

assessment.note: He sounds engaged with the technical material but volunteered a clarity gap about how decisions get made here; worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Decision-making gap
new_queue.name: When you say 'how decisions are really made here,' what feels least clear?

new_queue.label: Ownership boundaries
new_queue.name: Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy for you, Riley?

new_queue.label: Context gaps
new_queue.name: What context are you still missing before you make bigger calls, Riley?

new_queue.label: Ask early
new_queue.name: When you hit uncertainty, where do you go first for team context?

new_queue.label: Team contact
new_queue.name: Who have you had the most useful direct contact with so far, Riley?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
